principle: time follows actual scene actions, not turn count

rule.not_per_turn: Do not use one turn equals one minute.
rule.advance_by_content: Advance time by the real amount implied by actions, dialogue, pauses, travel and waiting.
rule.silence_counts: If the player waits, stands silently, watches, listens or deliberately delays, time must move.
rule.npc_actions_count: NPC dialogue/actions between player inputs also advance time.
rule.no_freeze: Do not keep time fixed unless the scene explicitly contains instant/near-instant reaction.

format_rule.current_time: After each scene, update current_time if enough seconds accumulate.
format_rule.rounding: Round to nearest plausible minute only after accumulating seconds; do not lose seconds.
format_rule.hidden_accumulator: Keep unrounded seconds in state if available.

start_scene_anchor.warning: By the time several replies, looks, pauses and movement happen, 02:43-02:45 may be plausible.
